items.title: Stablecoin boom could eat into traditional banks' profits, warn Jefferies analysts
items.summary: Digital dollar use in payments and crypto markets may slowly pull deposits from banks, forcing lenders to seek pricier funding, a new report by Jeffries finds.

items.title: Trump Meme Coin Down 96% From Peak as President's Approval Ratings Sink
items.summary: President Trump's official Solana meme coin fell to its lowest price since soon after launch as perceptions of his job performance suffer.

items.title: BitGo to custody digital assets for StableX’s $100M stablecoin plan
items.summary: The collaboration will provide custody and trading infrastructure as StableX builds a $100 million digital asset treasury focused on stablecoins.

items.title: Meta Acquires Moltbook, the Viral Social Network for AI Agents: Report
items.summary: Moltbook is a Reddit-style platform where AI agents interact with each other, spawning communities—and even a digital religion.

items.title: SEC chair calls for ‘coordinated oversight‘ between US regulators
items.summary: Paul Atkins said that he had stopped ”duplicative enforcement actions” between the SEC and CFTC, stressing the need for a coordinated approach.

items.title: Bitcoin leads, altcoin indicators drop to intriguing lows: Time for an altseason?
items.summary: Bitcoin is the frontrunner in the crypto market, while 36% of altcoins trade near their all-time lows. Do altcoin price metrics suggest an altseason is next?

items.title: There's a Benchmark Test That Measures AI 'Bullshit'—Most Models Fail
items.summary: BullshitBench tests whether AI models can detect nonsensical questions—or if they'll confidently answer them anyway. The results are dire.

items.title: Investment firm Multicoin bets 'Internet Labor Markets' will drive crypto’s next wave of adoption
items.summary: According to the firm, the next wave of users that will onboard into crypto will be thanks to networks where users earn crypto by contributing work rather than buying tokens outright.

items.title: Crypto hacks fall to $49M in February as attackers shift to phishing scams
items.summary: Crypto theft slowed sharply last month after a spike in January, but security companies warn that scammers are increasingly exploiting wallet permissions and social engineering tactics.

items.title: Senators try to unlock stalled crypto Clarity Act with compromise on stablecoin yield
items.summary: As the window narrows to pass a crypto market structure bill this year, lawmakers told bankers at a Washington summit that the final bill won't risk deposits.

items.title: Polymarket and Palantir team to protect integrity of sports betting as prediction markets face key moment
items.summary: The new monitoring platform aims to detect suspicious trading as prediction markets face scrutiny over insider information.

items.title: Circle could rally 60% more on stablecoin adoption, AI agentic finance, Bernstein says
items.summary: Stablecoins are decoupling from crypto market cycles as they are increasingly used for digital payments, Bernstein analysts said, which bodes well for USDC issuer Circle.

items.title: Societe Generale-FORGE launches EURCV stablecoin on Stellar
items.summary: The French banking group’s digital asset arm expanded its MiCA-compliant euro-backed stablecoin as part of a multichain strategy for regulated digital asset infrastructure.

items.title: U.S. SEC chief Atkins said bond with sister agency CFTC to include joint meetings, exams
items.summary: The SEC chairman made clear that formal new ties between the U.S. markets regulators will run so deep as to include combined meetings with firms pitching products.

items.title: Bitcoin orderbook shows imbalance: Will $70K hold?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s sell-side liquidity reached a two-month high, mirroring a setup seen in January. Should traders prepare for a sell-off?

items.title: UK government‘s long-term fraud strategy labels crypto as ‘growing risk‘
items.summary: A policy paper from the UK government's Home Office said that “vulnerabilities remain” in authorities' attempts to fight fraud in emerging payments, including digital assets.

items.title: Why banks are moving beyond single-provider stablecoin payment rails
items.summary: Insitutions experimenting with stablecoins are shifting from single-vendor pilots to multi-provider infrastructure designed for global reach.

items.title: Why crypto's privacy problem is a total dealbreaker for mainstream users
items.summary: Without privacy, the industry is fundamentally mismatched with its audience and stalling mass adoption, argues Gruell.

items.title: Crypto shouldn’t “die on the hill” of stablecoin yield, Rick Edelman says
items.summary: The veteran financial advisor says the banking lobby will likely win the yield-bearing stablecoin debate.

items.title: Elon Musk's X Money App Nears Public Launch, No Sign of Dogecoin
items.summary: X Money, Elon Musk's financial "everything app," is getting closer to its public launch, but Dogecoin (DOGE) doesn't have an apparent role.

items.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE price will hit $150 by August, predicts Arthur Hayes
items.summary: HYPE technical setup points to an initial breakout toward $50, with growing demand for macro-linked perps adding to the upside case.

items.title: Bitcoin climbs past $71,000 as oil shock fears continue to ease
items.summary: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Tuesday said it will convene an extraordinary meeting of its member countries to consider releasing emergency oil reserves.

items.title: Canaan stacks Bitcoin, bucking rival miners' rush to sell
items.summary: Bitcoin miner Canaan boosted its BTC and ETH reserves to record levels in February, expanding its Texas operations even as many public mining firms reduce holdings.

items.title: CFTC chair highlights wide crypto agenda, including rules on DeFi, prediction markets
items.summary: Commodity Futures Trading Commission chief Michael Selig updated his progress on guidance for DeFi developers, crypto derivatives and prediction markets.

items.title: Polymarket, Peter Thiel's Palantir Eye 'Surveillance Models' for Sports Prediction Markets
items.summary: Polymarket will work with Palantir on developing systems for rooting out insider trading and manipulation in sports prediction markets.

items.title: Bitcoin hits $71.5K+ local high as analyst sees bears 'stepping in' soon

items.title: Vitalik Buterin pushes ‘DVT-Lite’ to make Ethereum validator setup easier
items.summary: In a post on X, the blockchain's co-founder said the Ethereum Foundation is testing a new method for running validators that could make staking infrastructure significantly easier for institutions holding large amounts of ether.

items.title: Bitcoin Rises as Trump Amplifies Iran Threats, Fed Rate Cut Chances Fall Near Zero
